map.comment: If it was a scheduled task, change the event type
map.label: input/task/taskScheduleId != null

sequence.comment: Only execute if we started it, it may have been started by another server in the mean time
sequence.label: started

map.comment: Get the currently enabled features (there might be some overlap)
List the features that still need to be enabled
Chain a new task for this queue if possible
If we could not reschedule a task, check that the queue is done
map.label: amountOfRescheduledTasks = 0

map.comment: If you set a custom code, use that
map.label: classification/code != null

map.comment: If you set a custom message, use that
map.label: classification/message != null

map.comment: Check if we should automatically set the task to failed
If we have an explicit fail, override whatever is set in the classification (runtime wins over configuration time)
map.label: fail == true

map.comment: Pause queue if it is a serial queue and we did not set it immediately to failed. If we want to do transient reprocessing, we can pause it because the retry intervals might be large
If we are not going to retry, emit an event to notify everyone of the pause
map.label: classification/retryInterval == null

map.comment: Get run date and downgrade event to a WARNING

sequence.comment: Make sure we unlock local lock
Make sure we unlock the global lock
Only execute if we started it, it may have been started by another server in the mean time
sequence.label: started

map.comment: Chain a new task for this queue if possible
If we could not reschedule a task, check that the queue is done
map.label: amountOfRescheduledTasks = 0

map.comment: Kickstart scheduler if this was a scheduled task
map.label: started && input/task/taskScheduleId != null

map.comment: Kickstart local subscriber to check once more (if not already busy)
